Name: PATH_FIND_COST_PARAM_ST
Description: Defines how much it costs an enemy to pathfind in the air or the ground. Higher cost means less likely pathfinding.

Fields.Name: Ground Node Cost Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier to apply to grounded pathfinding.

Fields.Name: Air Node Cost Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier to apply to airborne pathfinding.
